leadText: The Academy Cup (Japanese: スクールカップ School Cup) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Academy Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The academy's standard-issue cup for picnicking. The careful design of its mouth makes it popular both inside and outside the academy.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Academy Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The academy's standard-issue cup for picnicking. The careful design of its mouth makes it popular both inside and outside the academy. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Mesagoza (automatically obtained after beginning the Treasure Hunt)
